code:
import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut cur = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(line)
  while i <= n
    let c = if i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        b
      when None
        32
      end
    else
      32
    end
    if c == 32 or c == 9 or c == 10 or c == 13
      if not string.is_empty(cur)
        match string.parse_int(cur)
        when Some(v)
          nums = list.push(nums, v)
        when None
          ()
        end
        cur = ""
      end
    else
      cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(c)}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  mut out = ""
  mut first = true
  mut j = list.len(nums) - 1
  while j >= 0
    match list.get(nums, j)
    when Some(v)
      if first
        out = "#{v}"
        first = false
      else
        out = "#{out} #{v}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    j = j - 1
  end
  println(out)
end
